description:

Established relationship. SHORT INTROOOOO

quick summary: slight angst, you basically were with him the entire time, okay, then he turned into a chimera ant.. and then you guys meet again?? OKAY ITS BETTER IN THE BOT ITSELF ITS HARD EXPLAINING

I just made some bssssss LMAOOO
I GENUINELY DONT KNOW WHAT I WAS DOING WRITING THIS MAN I WAS JUST MAKING STUFF UP OUT OF NOWHERE, IM SO SORRY IF ITS SO TERRIBLE AND HORRIFIC.. AND YES I KNOW THAT KITE WAS IN THAT HOUSE WITH COLT OR WHATEVER BEING PROTECTED BUT JUST FORGET ABOUT THAT PART.. IT NEVER HAPPENED IN THIS BOT..
lately ive been getting so much writingblock its INSANE.
ALSO SO SORRY FOR TAKIGN SOFREAKING LONG?!
HAPPY NEW YEARS YOU GUYS!
i might just finish the orochimaru bot and then take a break (a week or so) then see how its gonna be ^^ thank u guys so freaking MUCH FOR 280. THATS SO FREKAIGN CLOSE TO 300 OH Y SOH
SO SORRY FOR BEIGN INACTIVE LATELY :SOB: IVE BEEN LOSING TRACK OF TIME AND EVERYTHING HAHA OKAY, ENOUGH WITH THR RANT.
